title: Inventory Switcher
description: Separate inventories per game mode world and per island if players have more than one. Players keep different items, XP, advancements, and gear for each BentoBox game.
body:
# 🎒 Inventory Switcher — Separate Inventories Per World

Running multiple BentoBox game modes on one server? Inventory Switcher keeps each game mode's inventory completely separate. Players won't carry SkyBlock items into OneBlock or vice versa. If you allow multiple islands per player, then Inventory Switcher can keep those separate too!

## What Gets Switched

- Inventory and armor
- Experience and levels
- Health, hunger, and effects
- Ender chest contents
- Advancements (configurable)

## Features

- **Automatic switching** — seamless transition when moving between game mode worlds
- **Per-world storage** — each game mode has its own saved inventory
- **Configurable** — choose exactly what gets switched
- **Works with all BentoBox game modes**

Essential for multi-gamemode servers.

📦 Requires [BentoBox](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bentobox).
